holdings.infoBox: DNL is an equity ETF with a total of 214 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 11.07%, ASML Holding at 7.70%, Tencent Holdings at 3.69%, LVMH Moët Hennessy - Louis Vuitton, Société Européenne at 3.19%, and AstraZeneca at 2.70%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree Global ex-U.S. Quality Growth Fund (DNL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund provides exposure to a modified market-cap weighted index of international and emerging markets, ex-US equity. The index selects dividend paying companies screened for quality and growth factors DNL was launched on Jun 16, 2006 and is issued by WisdomTree.
